subcodes.first_line: The lowly servant hath been honored to receive Thy letter, which was as a chalice of yearning for the lovers, and from which I drank [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تشرف الخادم الفانی بکتاب حضرتک الذی کان قدح الاشتیاق للعشاق و کنت اشرب منه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters
